title: Towards Offshore Hydrogen Platform in Tunisia: The Key-Steps
author: Jaafar, Hassen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Among serious investments that enhance economic growth in Tunisia is developing alternative and renewable energy resources such as sustainable workflow for Hydrogen production. Three majors steps are controlled to overcome efficient capacity : * Having good quality water input * Assembling upscaled water electrolysis * Compressed Hydrogen to transfer or storage.
steps_raw: Among serious investments that enhance economic growth in Tunisia is developing alternative and renewable energy resources such as sustainable workflow for Hydrogen production. Three majors steps are controlled to overcome efficient capacity : * Having good quality water input * Assembling upscaled water electrolysis * Compressed Hydrogen to transfer or storage.
keywords: Green Hydrogen, Energy Storage & Transfer, Giga-Electrolysis
